workflow.name: LLM Suggestion Feedback Workflow
workflow.description: FE-16 mo rong FE-15 bang cach them user feedback cho `LlmSuggestion`, expose feedback summary tren suggestion APIs, va aggregate feedback thanh prompt context cho nhung lan LLM suggestion generation tiep theo.

architectureOverview.summary: FE-16 phai dua tren `LlmSuggestion` da ton tai trong `TestGeneration`. Feedback state la durable state moi trong `testgen`, con `LlmAssistant` tiep tuc lo cache/audit. Vi feedback co the lam thay doi prompt generation, cache fingerprint cho FE-06 / FE-15 cung phai thay doi theo.
architectureOverview.futureExtension: FE-17 co the reuse cung table feedback nay cho bulk review dashboards hoac batch prompt analytics.

steps.action: Load suite + validate owner + reject archived suite + load suggestion by `suggestionId + testSuiteId`.
Reject feedback on `Superseded`; trim/normalize notes; upsert one row per `(SuggestionId, UserId)`.
Load suggestions by suite, then join feedback rows needed for current user and aggregate summary counts.
UI can show thumbs-up / thumbs-down state plus helpful/not-helpful counts.

flows.name: Build Feedback Context For Future Suggestion Generation

steps.action: Before cache lookup, request endpoint-scoped feedback summaries for the current suite + endpoint set.
Aggregate recent helpful/not-helpful notes, truncate text, and build a stable feedback fingerprint.
Append fingerprint into cache-key material and include feedback context in prompt/payload generation.
Compute cache key from suite/spec/endpoints + feedback fingerprint.
Cache hit with same fingerprint -> reuse cached suggestions. Cache miss or changed fingerprint -> call live LLM with feedback context.
Receives suggestions informed by prior feedback without stale cache leakage.

qualityGates.name: Feedback State Stays In TestGeneration
qualityGates.rule: Khong luu durable feedback state vao `llmassistant` schema hay cache blobs.

qualityGates.name: One Feedback Row Per User Per Suggestion
qualityGates.rule: Submit feedback nhieu lan phai update row cu, khong duoc insert duplicate.

qualityGates.name: Feedback Must Affect Cache Fingerprint
qualityGates.rule: Neu prompt refinement consume feedback context, cache key cua suggestion generation phai doi theo feedback fingerprint.

qualityGates.name: No FE-15 Regression
qualityGates.rule: List/detail/review/generate preview cua FE-15 van phai hoat dong sau khi bo sung feedback metadata.

qualityGates.name: Migration Required
qualityGates.rule: Vi them entity durable moi trong TestGeneration, phai co migration moi va `--verify-migrations` phai xanh.

examples: Notes vuot qua gioi han do dai sau normalize.
Khong tim thay suggestion theo `suggestionId + testSuiteId`.
SUGGESTION_SUPERSEDED: Suggestion da bi supersede boi preview set moi.

implementationChecklist.name: Persistence
tasks: Dang ky repository + DbSet + indexes/unique constraint.

implementationChecklist.name: Prompt Refinement
tasks: Cap nhat `LlmScenarioSuggester` va payload/prompt context de consume feedback.

implementationChecklist.name: API Surface
tasks: Them command + request/response models cho PUT feedback.
Mo rong list/detail models de tra feedback summary.

implementationChecklist.name: Verification
tasks: Targeted unit tests cho feedback + prompt cache key.
Migrator build + verify migrations + targeted WebAPI build.
